Key words are clearly defined. Quizzes check students' comprehension of the material. Read more Mnemonics help kids memorize information. Funny doodles keep students engaged. The BIG FAT NOTEBOOKS Are Going to High School! These new books help high school students understand the key concepts of Geometry, Chemistry, Biology and Pre-Algebra & Algebra 1, with lively illustrations, helpful memorization tools, and all the big ideas of each course clearly explained. Read more Everything You Need to Ace World History in One Big Fat Notebook Everything You Need to Ace Science in One Big Fat Notebook Everything You Need to Ace Computer Science and Coding in One Big Fat Notebook Everything You Need to Ace American History in One Big Fat Notebook Everything You Need to Ace English Language Arts in One Big Fat Notebook Everything You Need to Ace Math in One Big Fat Notebook More BIG FAT NOTEBOOKS Covers the Paleolithic Era and transports the reader to ancient civilizations—from Africa to middle ages across the world; the Renaissance; the age of exploration, revolutions, and the modern world with the wars and movements that shaped it. Covers a wide range of concepts including scientific investigation; the periodic table; forces and motion; forms of energy; outer space; biology; ecology; and more. Explores computing systems; binary code; algorithms; computational thinking; programming; web development; cybersecurity; and more. Covers Colonial America; the Revolutionary War; expansion west; the Civil War and Reconstruction; notable events of the 20th century—the World Wars, Depression, Civil Rights movement; and more. Covers grammar; reading comprehension; parts of speech; active and passive verbs; textual analysis; authorship; structure; writing arguments, informative texts, and narratives; and more. Covers everything to get a student over any math hump: fractions and decimals; ratios, proportions, and percentages; geometry; statistics; expressions and equations; and more.
